tree.name: Duncan Robinson
tree.tradeDescription: DET traded Simone Fontecchio to MIA for Duncan Robinson. Miami also received a trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: Simone Fontecchio
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DET traded Kevin Knox II, Gabriele Procida, and a 2024 2nd round draft pick (Kyle Filipowski) to UTA for Simone Fontecchio. Utah also received a trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: Kevin Knox II
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as a free agent by Detroit

assetsGivenUp.name: Gabriele Procida
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DET traded Jerami Grant and Ismael Kamagate to POR for Gabriele Procida, 2025 1st round pick (MIL), 2025 2nd round pick, and 2026 2nd round pick

assetsGivenUp.name: Jerami Grant
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DET traded cash to DEN for Jerami Grant and Nikola Radičević. Denver also received a trade exception

assetsGivenUp.name: Ismael Kamagate
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 46th overall by Detroit (via BKN pick) in the 2022 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: 2024 2nd Round Pick (#32)
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: DET traded Sekou Doumbouya and Jahlil Okafor to BKN for DeAndre Jordan, cash, and multiple 2nd round picks

assetsGivenUp.name: Sekou Doumbouya
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Drafted 15th overall by Detroit in the 2019 NBA Draft

assetsGivenUp.name: Jahlil Okafor
assetsGivenUp.tradeDescription: Signed as a free agent by Detroit
